response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 3 songs based on on-screen text and performance. 2. Performed searches for original lyrics in Japanese and English translations. 3. Mapped the scenes and performers. 4. Compiled the final JSON according to the schema.
response.global_summary: A compilation video featuring multiple vocal performances by Hololive VTubers. The songs include 'Okochama Sensou' originally by GigaP, 'Lead Control' originally by Naruyama, and 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy' originally by MaikiP.

scenes.description: The song 'Okochama Sensou' is performed by four VTubers in a colorful, stage setting. The on-screen text identifies it as a popular vocaloid song.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Once upon a time, and a time before that,
A pair of noble siblings, who were good friends,
(ry)
"Do it properly!"
The butler calls, "Take your seats, ready, set, go!"
We respond with knives and forks in hand
Because we are bourgeois
We are noble, noble aristocrats, you see
Bow down, commoners! I'll show you
The difference between you and us, Vice-Viceroy!
Hey, wait, wait, doing that on your own again?
Trying to bluff like you can see through everything?
Yes, yes, yes, yes
As you wish, my dear brother (lol)
Ah, it makes me mad! It really makes me mad!
That cheeky attitude towards your brother
Sound the trumpet of war, ring the gong!
Declaration of war, conflict erupts!
Playing pranks, egging each other on
Look, look, with an escalating style!
Bought an 'all-you-can-sell' deal
Thanks for your patronage, your defeat
(Yes!)
With clumsy tactics and mutual goading
It's decided by the brinkmanship
To show my brother's dignity, rain or shine
Sparks flying, eye to eye
Eat this! I'm the ruler of the rule book!
I'm not a coward, I'm not afraid
I just lack a little courage
Come, come, everyone, lend me your hands
Of course, completely calm and composed
Born with status and
Starting a sparkly life
Yes, refutation, yes, refutation, yes, refutation
I'll take the V-sign
Yay!
Yes, yes, yes, yes
Well done, good job
Ah, it makes me mad! It really makes me mad!
That impudent back-talk directed at me
I'll show you something special
Retaliation, provocation, you've done it
Playing dirty, one step ahead
In a stance that'll take the chance
Oh no, a fatal mistake, oops!
It's a pity, your defeat
Yes!
But you, only you
(Seiya! To, ya, u, u, ya, a, ha!)
Are a rival suited for me
(Seiya! To, ya, u, to, ya, a, ha!)
Falling, feeling depressed
(U, ha, seiya! Ya, sei, ha!)
Because the mood is being disrupted
Tonight, with you, yai yai yai yai
[...]
Sound the trumpet of war, ring the gong!
The next-gen emperor is... "This me!" "That me!"
Playing pranks, egging each other on
Look, look, with an escalating style!
Taking everything from one to a hundred
Thanks for your patronage, your defeat
Wait, it's a draw?!
Eh?!

scenes.description: The song 'Lead Control' is performed. VTubers are shown in a darker, more dramatic stage production with chains and dramatic lighting. Text on screen identifies 'Music: Naruyama'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
この頃 君が纏う 「躾直し」の季節の匂い
強かな佇まいの割に脆い ソコに触れるの
怒らないで darling！
だってホントのことだもん
身体ばっかデカくなって 中身はガキだよね (笑)
暴れないで doggie！
私 華奢な手だから
リードなんて気まぐれで パッと落としちゃうかも
「だらしない！ 意気地ない！
ホント君は救えない！
堕落に耽っちゃって ご愁傷様
夢がない！ 糧もない！
くせに愛は欲しいの？
なら3回まわって お手から…」
(ワン)
よーく聞いて darling
僻み妬み 人の企み
この世は罠だらけ
ねえ ずっとここにいて？
ひれ伏して doggie
生まれ持った才と脳で
全部を黙らせて 今日も稼いじゃう私の前に
follow or die でも 餌は気分次第
ねえ ワタシを知らなかった頃の日々に戻りたい？
walk into a trap 無知な babe 侵す drug
もうワタシを知らなかった頃のキミには戻らない…
「だらしない、意気地ない、
ホント君は救えない。」
どこにも行けないね
くだらない！ 果てしない！
こんな広い世界で
私に堕ちていく
君が好き！
夢がない！ 糧もない！
くせに愛が欲しいの！
「なら3回まわって
お手から…」
(ワン)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The scent of the season of "re-education" you're wrapped in lately
Touching the fragile spot despite your tough exterior
Don't get angry, darling!
Because it's the truth, you see
Your body's grown big, but inside you're just a kid (lol)
Don't rampage, doggie!
Because my hands are delicate
My leash might just slip off on a whim
"So sloppy! No backbone!
You're truly beyond saving!
Indulging in depravity, my condolences
No dreams! No sustenance!
And yet you crave love?
Then turn around three times and give me a paw..."
(Woof)
Listen well, darling
Jealousy, envy, people's schemes
This world is full of traps
Hey, will you stay here forever?
Bow down, doggie
With the talent and brain you were born with
Make them all silent, I'll keep earning today
Follow or die, but the bait depends on my mood
Hey, do you want to go back to the days before you knew me?
Walk into a trap, ignorant babe, the drug that invades
I won't let you go back to the you from before you knew me...
"So sloppy, no backbone,
You're truly beyond saving."
You can't go anywhere, can you?
Worthless! Endless!
In this wide world
You keep falling for me
I love you!
No dreams! No sustenance!
And yet you crave love!
"Then turn around three times
And give me a paw..."
(Woof)

scenes.description: The final segment of the video showcases 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy'. The lighting changes to neon/punk colors and the VTubers perform in a more energetic style. Text identifies 'Music: Maiki P'.

バイバイ バズメロディ

化けんな

ぶざまでも

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The music you have written is no longer in use
Please rewrite everything
I just don’t get it!!!!
I just don’t get it!!!!
It’s not like anyone’s actually listening
Music’s all just like fast fashion
Players preying on the voiceless are out after a one night stand
It’s not like you’re trying to say anything
Filming TikToks for clout or whatever
All to look so damn fake? You’re scum, good night
Doesn’t matter what you do or where you look
The gurus are already jamming up the place
Even so the loners are here and there and everywhere
Deadass, Gen Z monkeys all have their own demands
I need a punchline here
Make it about whatever you want
I don’t care what the lyrics are saying
Just gimme something hype
Come, everyone, and laugh with me
Focusing on numbers over artistic value?
What a disgusting price to pay for a virus
So now what? Just gonna take it?
My brain keeps going ‘round and round so might as well drop dead
(I found myself instead)
Cut the bullshit! Bye bye, trendy melodies
Keep on doubting! Lies are always in our vicinity
Stop conforming! Having fantasies and ideals is just fine
What happened to all the shit you wanted to sing about?
Your clumsiness is alright cuz it’s never a lie
Before you get drunk on the money and pretentious pop
Don’t give in! Now awaken everyone’s heartbeats
What happened to all the shit I wanted to sing about?
I just don’t get it!!!!
